ices Our recharge services are focused on yearly user support and systems management contracts for Unix and Windows systems . Use the "Contracts & Support" link on the left to learn more about our available contracts, or to start a new support contr

ailable contracts, or to start a new support contract. For non-contract hardware, software, and repair support, CUSG also accepts job requests based on an hourly labor rate and cost of materials. Computer User Support Group 395 Cory Hall #1770, Berke
